overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage of a snowy gothic castle garden at twilight. The player character moves through a stone archway into a formal garden with a central tiered fountain, passing robed NPCs, with snow-covered mountains and castle walls visible through the atmospheric haze.

events.description: passing through the stone archway from the enclosed entry path into the open garden

agents.ego_description: walking along a snow-dusted path toward a large gothic stone archway

notable_agents.action: distant robed figure visible through the archway walking ahead

entered.detail: large gothic stone archway with decorative pillars and snow-covered capstones
tall stone garden wall with crenellations
leafless trees with heavy snow accumulation on branches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow snow-covered garden path flanked by stone walls and winter trees. The camera approaches a grand gothic archway, passing through it at the end of the segment to reveal the open garden beyond. A distant figure is visible through the arch.

scene_state.functional_zone: open formal garden plaza with mountain backdrop

events.description: the robed figure ahead turns left and exits the frame while camera continues forward
entering the main garden plaza with scattered NPCs and the central fountain becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the open garden plaza, observing the surroundings and other figures

entered.detail: massive snow-capped mountain range visible through the haze beyond the garden walls
tall fortified stone walls of the castle complex
large multi-tiered stone fountain in the garden center

segments.scene_description: Exiting the archway into a wide open garden plaza with a dramatic mountain backdrop. The camera moves through the space as other robed figures walk about. The tiered central fountain and castle walls become prominent features in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: central fountain plaza with formal boxwood hedges

events.description: approaching the central tiered fountain, moving from garden path onto the plaza
circling around the fountain basin to view the water and lily pads

agents.ego_description: walking around the central fountain, observing the water feature and other garden visitors

notable_agents.action: two robed figures standing and conversing near the fountain edge

entered.detail: trimmed boxwood hedges lining the garden paths, dusted with snow
ornate stone benches placed along the garden walkways

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and circles the central tiered fountain, which features water flowing into a basin with lily pads. Formal hedges and stone benches line the plaza. Other robed figures are scattered throughout the area, some conversing near the fountain.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path with view of castle spire

events.description: moving away from the fountain plaza toward the castle walls and spire
approaching area with brighter sky visible near the castle spire

agents.ego_description: walking along garden paths past seated NPCs, heading toward the castle spire

notable_agents.action: group of robed figures sitting on stone benches conversing

entered.detail: tall gothic spire rising from the castle structure, backlit by twilight sky

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the central fountain along a curved garden path. The camera passes groups of NPCs sitting on benches and conversing. A prominent castle spire becomes visible on the left against the twilight sky as the camera continues through the formal garden.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, snowy corridor that opens into a sprawling, atmospheric gothic garden at twilight. It begins on a narrow snow-covered path flanked by stone walls and winter trees, moving steadily forward until it passes through a grand gothic archway. As the camera exits the arch, the space expands into a wide plaza where robed figures wander against a dramatic backdrop of towering mountains and distant castle walls. The scene then shifts to circle a central tiered fountain with flowing water and lily pads, gliding past formal hedges and stone benches where NPCs converse. Finally, the camera moves away from the fountain along a curved path, passing more seated figures before a prominent castle spire emerges on the left against the darkening sky.
